name: Because the Side of Justice Will Be Whichever Side Wins!!

issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' not 'OnAttacked'. Counter is a distinct trigger type for trap/interrupt effects.
TrashFromHand should be optional (conditional/may). Current structure forces discard. Should use conditional logic: 'You may trash 1 card' means the power boost only applies if trash occurs.
Second effect (Rest action on opponent character) has no basis in card text. This effect should not exist. Card only grants +3000 power conditionally on trash, nothing about resting opponent cards.
Filter should specify 'Hand' context to clarify trashing from hand, not just 'Any'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.
